item.title: When your outer world matches your inner shit

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1712 (waffle house painting)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
My face when I heard a Northern Pygmy Owl calling this morning in my apartment complex.
Late post today, went birding first thing after I woke up. Sorry for the delay.
I didn't see anything new for my year list today but I think I got some good photos. I definitely did get some bad photos!
I can't figure out where I put my raw sienna and burnt sienna paint, and i need those colors for the bird I'm painting. I can't exactly just go off and buy tubes of paint at affordable prices around here. And im pretty sure I had them, I set them aside for this project... somewhere.
Someone sent me this and said "I could see you pulling this shit" and... yeah they're probably not wrong.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin!" ____
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: “In my day they didn’t exist”OH I THINK WE DID
item.dc:creator: cryptidofthewood

item.title: Attraction to Trans Women - 40 Yrs Ago
item.description:
The first trans Bond girl was an absolute menace, and I loved every minute of this interview. I deep dive into the full interview in my new video that just premiered this morn: https://youtu.be/aAQAzanuYiU
I am so proud of This Video and hope you can be there to Live Chat with me while it Premieres at 7:30am PST! https://youtu.be/aAQAzanuYiU Or if you miss the premiere, give it a watch when you can, I find Tula's story so fascinating! Disclaimer for folks since yesterday I was pressed about this - All of my Youtube revenue goes to Trans Charities. This is me sharing my art here because I love doing that with the community :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Farmer donates land for a park, city sells it for data center.
item.description: Feels like a soft piece to smooth out a massive screw over. https://www.tomshardware.com/tech-industry/farmer-donates-land-for-a-park-city-sells-it-for-data-center-development-usd10-gift-became-usd10m-for-city-government-with-usd30m-tax-expected-over-next-decade
item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: Mini pride collection
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Memes vol 697 Books
item.description:
Hello everybody! Please tell me your favorite book you’ve read this year! I’ve read 88 so far but my absolute favorite was “when the tides held the moon” by Vanessa Vida Kelley it was absolutely phenomenal. The nickel boys by Colson Whitehead was also really really really good
Exquisite corpses
I totally thought I made this meme up. I listen to bare a pop opera all the time and they sing this part in queen mab I always respond to Jason in my head with “that you’re full of shit” to ease the pain of listening to the song and I thought I had come up with that. Alas.
Magic treehouse actually
Or you pull out your vibrator. WHO SAID THAT
I had a friend in high school who was learning Greek so he could translate the original text of the Bible. Theres Christian and then theres that. Shout out Klae I hope you did it you crazy bastard
The raven boys
The secret history
Six of crows
A guest in the house- this was so confusing to me but it had the most beautiful art ever
Saga
Bunny by Mona Awad
The raven boys
Ninth house
I posted this on Reddit and went “oh wow I like cats”
Gertie and Bruce tax
Nessie tax

item.title: I have been asked to not bring my favorite sign to the weekly stand-in protest anymore. "It's too divisive, we won't change minds with that kind of language". We're not going to change minds anyway! We're just rallying our side!

item.title: Good morning to my fellow night people. Only 12 more hours till we take back our world.
item.dc:creator: BuckFudddy

item.title: 32 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 282
item.description:
A Japanese man, Toshiyuki Kuroki, spent two years planting thousands of fragrant pink flowers around his home to help his wife Yasuko after she lost her sight to diabetes and became depressed. Apparently, the clouds of scent and the visitors the flowers attracted helped bring her out of her shell.
~u/Difficult_Win_9904
I've been super sick lately and haven't been able to work. If you can help out, it would be appreciated: https://ko-fi.com/hoopsnek
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 869
item.description:

23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Aaron Paul
"What wisdom, what warning can prevail against gladness? There is no law so strong that a little gladness may not transgress." - Henry David Thoreau So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.*
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Trump has been saying we've won the war with Iran for the past 100 days. – "In the first hour it was over"
